title: Issue with "Too many digits for 32 bit number" error?

features.name: unsized hex literal on wide parameter
features.description: Code should include a large unsized hex literal (exceeding 32 bits) assigned to a parameter with explicit width specification using 'h syntax without width prefix
features.snippet:
localparam int BigKeyWidth = 512;
localparam logic [BigKeyWidth-1:0] BigKey = 'h6D5A1BA6540E36AE7384C94779710E89BAB5778362E9B302C3A2CF202B5615A9DD5E8EF2E2EF40444F7C23BBB76A508BF48BE900D8A33DAE8829FB3C643771A6;
